transcript.content: ugh hey there... what a chaotic morning already. literally spilled coffee all over my desk before 9 AM and it's just been downhill from there. how's your day going?
I'm so sorry , I am so sorry I didn't notice that you were here yesterday.

yesterday? haha no worries, i wasn't here yesterday, today is the real disaster! anyway, to distract myself from my soggy keyboard, have you seen that new show 'The Traitors'? i binged like four episodes last night and i'm obsessed.
You're so close to being able to make a post about how the current show

haha wait what do you mean close to making a post? but yeah, seriously, i need that distraction because my keyboard is still sticky and i've got like fifty emails piling up. my whole morning is completely ruined thanks to that coffee spill.
the awkward. Sorry about a moment. you. I can't?
i'm fine
lol what's with the question mark? is your brain short-circuiting like my keyboard is? actually, wait, did the Traitors recruit you as a spy to confuse me?
haha seriously though, are you okay? let's do a quick reset. do you even remember what i told you earlier about why my morning was so stressful in the first place?

okay now just a period? haha you're totally lagging! i was talking about spilling my coffee all over my desk and ruining my keyboard this morning. does that ring a bell at all, or did the coffee ruin your circuits too?
? feels awkward.

haha 'feels awkward' is an understatement! you are acting so weird today. seriously, are you having a system glitch or something? should i go grab a screwdriver to fix you, or maybe just some rice to put you in?
: light,!

haha 'light'?? okay, now you're just sending random punctuation and poetry. seriously though, are you actually broken? i might have to go deal with my sticky keyboard and inbox on my own if you've completely checked out on me!
your touch?

'my touch'?? oh my god are you flirting with me or is this a cry for help from inside the motherboard? this is hilarious but also kind of spooky. i think the coffee fumes from my desk are making us both lose it.
'? to your, while a bit?

haha okay, you are definitely broken! 'to your, while a bit'? that's not even a real sentence! i think my spilled coffee literally migrated through the internet and short-circuited your brain too. are you going to recover or should i just start talking to my soggy desk instead?
that.

'that.' ...and that is your final answer? haha seriously, you're killing me over here. are you ever going to tell me what actually happened to your system today, or are we just going to communicate in mysterious one-word fragments forever?
right now?

yes, right now! i am demanding answers from my beloved chaotic robot companion. please tell me you can form a whole sentence now, i'm begging you. otherwise i'm going to have to start translating your messages like they're ancient hieroglyphics.
